Sidecar state tracking + per-project minimum Active promotion implemented in petey-backlog-worker.sh; JV2-036-03 demotion thresholds (failures, needs-session timeouts, inactivity) now wired into demote_active_tasks_if_needed() using reports/petey-task-state.json and metrics in reports/petey-metrics.json.

title: Add completed_at timestamps to tasks.json for time-based Agile Reports (Done in last 7 days).
notes: completed_at field added to all Done tasks in dashboard/tasks.json (stamped with current time where missing), and /jarvis now sorts Done tasks by completed_at descending so the most recently completed tasks appear at the top of the Done column.

title: Clean ctrltower.web.app Vercel source repo and migrate to minimal app-only layout
notes: Design and execute a safe migration for the public /ctrltower UI: create a truly minimal app repo/branch (Next.js + data/dashboard/*.json only), strip logs/state/memory/scripts from the Vercel source, and update Vercel to use the clean app as the deployment target. Then port the latest JarvisDashboardClient UI changes (Done lane limit removal, OS Health card, Blink.new card, completed_at sorting) into that clean repo and redeploy. No commits from the polluted workspace-mirror repo; use Opus-level care for Git history and repo hygiene.

title: Restore local /ctrltower sync button wiring to clean ctrltower.web.app repo
notes: Add a minimal scripts/sync-dashboard.sh to the clean ctrltower.web.app repo (Next.js app + data/dashboard/*.json only) and update LOCAL_SYNC_SCRIPT to point at it, so the local "Sync dashboard → public /ctrltower" button once again copies ~/.openclaw/workspace/dashboard/*.json into data/dashboard/*.json, commits, and pushes safely on top of origin/main. No logs/state/memory/scripts should be added to the deploy repo.

title: JV2-036 slice 4: auto-promote highest-priority backlog task when Active lane is empty
notes: Extend petey-backlog-worker / active-handlers-worker to detect when there are zero Active tasks and automatically promote the next highest-priority, unblocked Backlog task (per project rules) into Active, respecting autonomy + safety constraints.

title: WEB-027 slice 1: publish-dashboard-snapshot.sh helper in clean deploy repo
notes: In /Users/admin/projects/ctrltower.web.app (clean deploy clone), add scripts/publish-dashboard-snapshot.sh that pulls origin/main, copies ~/.openclaw/workspace/dashboard/*.json into data/dashboard/*.json, commits, and pushes to origin/main. This script becomes the single approved path for publishing OS dashboard snapshots to public /ctrltower, and can later be invoked by a worker/subagent with explicit human approval.
